title: LAVISH: Create & Soar
description: MULTIPLAYER!! Create, Explore, Transport. Discover a Breath-taking Environment. Build to your hearts content.
body:
![LAVISH](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fcd80237c6cefa7d13a4c77c5523f00fd0a4525_0.webp) --- ### **IMPORTANT: Automatic Client Downloads** Lavish includes *AutoModpack*, which will automatically download essential data for **Distant Horizons** and **Journeymap**, configurations, and any necessary quick-fix mods directly to your client from the server. Be prepared for these updates when joining. **The data is 4GB+ and may take a while! Please make sure you have at least 15GB storage available!** --- ## Create, Explore, Transport – Welcome to *Lavish* **Lavish is a multiplayer-driven modpack aimed at providing an extraordinary world for building, exploring, and immersive transportation.**
_Heads up: This isn’t a lightweight modpack!_ You’ll need to allocate **at least 6GB of RAM** and run one of the three available shader options: **Potato, RTX OFF, or RTX ON**. These shaders aren’t just a recommendation; they’re crucial to experience the full aesthetic of the game. --- ### **Features** #### **A Curated Masterpiece** The world of Lavish is a breathtaking, hand-crafted landscape known as **Edoximos**.

![EDOXIMOS by McMeddon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49645780352c231b7fc0a330847e58dae0df5659.png)

This sprawling **64km² map**, crafted by the renowned **McMeddon**, offers endless beauty and discovery. Whether you want to build in lush forests, rugged mountains, or hidden valleys, there's always something spectacular to find. Check out more of McMeddon’s stunning creations at [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/mcmeddon/) or support him on [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/c/mcmeddon/posts). It’s worth a look! --- #### **Technology & Transportation – Creativity Unbound** What would a Minecraft world be without creativity? Lavish gives you the tools to bring your wildest dreams to life: - **Create Mod** – Build complex machines, automate tasks, and create intricate designs. - **Valkyrien Skies + Eureka** – Sail across vast oceans in ships or soar through the skies in fully functional airships! - **Farmer's Delight** – Grow and cook intricate meals, from simple salads to deluxe cheeseburgers. - **Applied Energistics 2** – Manage your resources and craft with ease using powerful systems. - **ComputerCraft** – Bring coding into Minecraft, automating even the smallest of tasks. Want to build a factory that serves gourmet burgers on a ship that sails across continents? Or perhaps an airship that flies through the clouds? It’s all possible in Lavish, and it’s waiting for you to dive in. --- #### **Distant Horizons – See Beyond the Fog** What’s the point of a world this grand if you can’t see it? Lavish features the full LOD (Level of Detail) baked into the map, allowing you to see **mountains, valleys, and even distant caves** without having to be nearby. It’s all right there in view, waiting for you to explore. --- #### **Immersive Sound & Proximity Chat** Lavish features proximity voice chat, allowing you to talk to players nearby with voices naturally fading as they move further away. Paired with **Sound Physics Remastered**, which adds realistic echoes and muffled sounds through walls, this creates a deeply immersive audio experience that reacts to the environment around you. --- #### **Journeymap & BlueMap – Your Eyes in the Sky** **Journeymap** data is fully integrated, providing an in-game bird’s-eye view of Edoximos. Zoom out, pan around, and chart your course with ease. And for even more exploration from your browser, Lavish has its very own [**BlueMap**](https://map.lavish.kenn.pro/), giving you a dynamic web-based map for planning your adventures in real-time. --- #### **Shader Variety – Three Unique Visual Styles** Lavish was designed with aesthetic perfection in mind, offering three shader choices to fit your rig: - **Potato** – For low-end PCs that still want to look stunning. - **RTX OFF** – A balance for those without ray tracing but still craving a sharp experience. - **RTX ON** – For those with powerful setups, delivering a breathtaking reimagining of Minecraft with ray tracing enabled. Each shader has been custom-tailored to fit the pack’s vision, blending **Complementary** with **Euphoria** or **Reimagining Pixels**, so every player can have a unified visual experience regardless of hardware. --- ### **What Are You Waiting For?** Step into the world of **Lavish**, where every corner of Edoximos begs to be explored, every structure to be built, and every journey to be taken. **Create, explore, and transport** your way through the most beautiful Minecraft experience yet. --- #### License & Disclaimer This modpack includes mods created by third-party developers. All included mods retain their original licenses and copyrights. This pack is distributed solely for ease of use, and I claim no rights to any of the included content. Please refer to the mod authors' respective licenses for terms of use.
